records.pTitle: Moving the Lux Sticks with a Keyboard & Mouse
records.pText: Move the left lux stick with <sprite name="button_Lstick03">, and the right with the mouse. There are three types of notes: rings, flowers, and bars.

Each type of note has a different way of catching it. The points you earn will change depending on how you catch the notes. Great catches will earn more points than nice catches. Aim for a high score!

Pass the wave line coming from between your lux sticks through the center of a note for a great catch! You don't even need to press anything! <sprite name="button_guidetx_heart">Heart notes are worth more points!

records.pTitle: Match Colors to Catch a Bouquet!
records.pText: Catch flower notes while holding <sprite name="button_A"> for the left and clicking with the mouse for the right! Flowers of the same color count as great catches! Even if they aren’t the same color, you’ll still get points.

records.pTitle: Bring Left and Right Sticks Together to Catch!
records.pText: Bring your lux sticks close together to wave them up and down and catch bar notes! Line up with the white part in the center of the bar note for a great catch!
You can move your lux sticks with just the mouse while they’re waving up and down! Use different directions on the keyboard and mouse to separate them!

records.pTitle: Rack Up Points to Trigger a Flashy Fever Time!
records.pText: The fever gauge will fill a bit every time you get points. Fill it to the floral indicator to trigger fever time! In addition to a showy performance on stage, it’s your chance to rack up tons of points!
